toolSpec.name: describe_log_groups
toolSpec.description: Lists AWS CloudWatch log groups and saved queries associated with them, optionally filtering by a name prefix.

account_identifiers.description: When include_linked_accounts is set to True, use this parameter to specify the list of accounts to search. IMPORTANT: Only has affect if include_linked_accounts is True

include_linked_accounts.description:
If the AWS account is a monitoring account, set this to True to have the tool return log groups in the accounts listed in account_identifiers.
                If this parameter is set to true and account_identifiers contains a null value, the tool returns all log groups in the monitoring account and all log groups in all source accounts that are linked to the monitoring account.

log_group_class.description: If specified, filters for only log groups of the specified class.

log_group_name_prefix.description: An exact prefix to filter log groups by name. IMPORTANT: Only log groups with names starting with this prefix will be returned.

max_items.description: The maximum number of log groups to return.

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

toolSpec.name: analyze_log_group
toolSpec.description: Analyzes a CloudWatch log group for anomalies, message patterns, and error patterns within a specified time window.

log_group_arn.description: The log group arn to look for anomalies in, as returned by the describe_log_groups tools

start_time.description: ISO 8601 formatted start time for the CloudWatch Logs Insights query window (e.g., "2025-04-19T20:00:00+00:00").

end_time.description: ISO 8601 formatted end time for the CloudWatch Logs Insights query window (e.g., "2025-04-19T21:00:00+00:00").

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

toolSpec.name: execute_log_insights_query
toolSpec.description: Executes a CloudWatch Logs Insights query and waits for the results to be available.

log_group_names.description: The list of up to 50 log group names to be queried. CRITICAL: Exactly one of [log_group_names, log_group_identifiers] should be non-null.

log_group_identifiers.description: The list of up to 50 logGroupIdentifiers to query. You can specify them by the log group name or ARN. If a log group that you're querying is in a source account and you're using a monitoring account, you must use the ARN. CRITICAL: Exactly one of [log_group_names, log_group_identifiers] should be non-null.

start_time.description: ISO 8601 formatted start time for the CloudWatch Logs Insights query window (e.g., "2025-04-19T20:00:00+00:00").

end_time.description: ISO 8601 formatted end time for the CloudWatch Logs Insights query window (e.g., "2025-04-19T21:00:00+00:00").

query_string.description: The query string in the Cloudwatch Log Insights Query Language. See https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/logs/CWL_QuerySyntax.html.

limit.description: The maximum number of log events to return. It is critical to use either this parameter or a `| limit <int>` operator in the query to avoid consuming too many tokens of the agent.

max_timeout.description: Maximum time in second to poll for complete results before giving up

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

toolSpec.name: get_logs_insight_query_results
toolSpec.description: Retrieves the results of a previously started CloudWatch Logs Insights query.

query_id.description: The unique ID of the query to retrieve the results for. CRITICAL: This ID is returned by the execute_log_insights_query tool.

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

toolSpec.name: cancel_logs_insight_query
toolSpec.description: Cancels an ongoing CloudWatch Logs Insights query. If the query has already ended, returns an error that the given query is not running.

query_id.description: The unique ID of the ongoing query to cancel. CRITICAL: This ID is returned by the execute_log_insights_query tool.

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

toolSpec.name: get_metric_data
toolSpec.description: Retrieves CloudWatch metric data for a specific metric.

start_time.description: The start time for the metric data query (ISO format or datetime)

end_time.description: The end time for the metric data query (ISO format or datetime), defaults to current time

statistic.description: The statistic to use for the metric

target_datapoints.description: Target number of data points to return (default: 60). Controls the granularity of the returned data.

group_by_dimension.description: Dimension name to group by in Metrics Insights mode. Must be included in schema_dimension_keys.

schema_dimension_keys.description: List of dimension keys to include in the SCHEMA definition for Metrics Insights query.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return in Metrics Insights mode (used with LIMIT clause).

sort_order.description: Sort order for results when using ORDER BY in Metrics Insights. Can be 'ASC', 'DESC', or None.

order_by_statistic.description: Statistic to use in the ORDER BY clause. Required if sort_order is specified.

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

toolSpec.name: get_metric_metadata
toolSpec.description: Gets metadata for a CloudWatch metric including description, unit and recommended

toolSpec.name: analyze_metric
toolSpec.description: Analyzes CloudWatch metric data to determine seasonality, trend, data density and statistical properties.

dimensions.description: List of dimensions that identify the metric, each with name and value

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

statistic.description: The statistic to use for the metric analysis

toolSpec.name: get_recommended_metric_alarms
toolSpec.description: Gets recommended alarms for a CloudWatch metric.

dimensions.description: List of dimensions that identify the metric, each with name and value

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

statistic.description: The statistic to use for alarm recommendations

toolSpec.name: get_active_alarms
toolSpec.description: Gets all CloudWatch Alarms currently in ALARM state.

max_items.description: Maximum number of alarms to return (default: 50). Large values may cause context window overflow and impact LLM performance.

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.

toolSpec.name: get_alarm_history
toolSpec.description: Gets the history for a CloudWatch alarm with time range suggestions for investigation.

alarm_name.description: Name of the alarm to retrieve history for

start_time.description: The start time for the history query in ISO format (e.g., '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z') or as a datetime object. Defaults to 24 hours ago.

end_time.description: The end time for the history query in ISO format (e.g., '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z') or as a datetime object. Defaults to current time.

history_item_type.description: Type of history items to retrieve. Possible values: 'ConfigurationUpdate', 'StateUpdate', 'Action'. Defaults to 'StateUpdate'.

max_items.description: Maximum number of history items to return (default: 50). Large values may cause context window overflow and impact LLM performance. Adjust time-range to limit responses.

include_component_alarms.description: For composite alarms, whether to include details about component alarms. Defaults to false.

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to AWS_REGION environment variable or us-east-1 if not set.

profile_name.description: AWS CLI Profile Name to use for AWS access. Falls back to AWS_PROFILE environment variable if not specified, or uses default AWS credential chain.
